title: The guy who spoiled smartphone launches for years just called it quits
summary: Evan Blass is done leaking upcoming devices, and it really does feel like the end of an era.
body: Credit: Robert Triggs / Android Authority TL;DR Reliable leaker Evan Blass says he’s stepping away from leaking phones after more than 15 years. Blass cited financial strain and a chronic health condition as reasons for his departure from the leaks space. Blass was behind countless early looks at Samsung, Motorola, Pixel devices, and other devices, making him one of the most trusted names in tech leaks. One of the tech industry’s most reliable leakers, Evan Blass, says he’s stepping away from the leaks game after more than a decade.
